Source: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/power-automate/
Fetched: 2026-03-31

# Microsoft Power Automate documentation

Discover how to make the most of Power Automate with online training courses, docs, and videos covering product capabilities and how-to articles.

## Key capabilities listed:
- Create automated flows
- Create scheduled flows
- Create desktop flows
- AI copilot capabilities (Copilot in cloud flows, Process Mining, desktop flows)
- Process mining capability
- Use solutions to distribute flows
- Integrate with Teams, SharePoint, Email
- Use Dataverse (Add/Delete rows, Upload/Download files and images)
- Use flows with Teams, SharePoint, Email, Forms, Approvals
- Business process flows
- Enterprise developer, ISV, and partner guide
- Custom connectors
- Desktop flow public APIs
- Data loss prevention policies

## Sections:
- Create and design
- Administer and extend
- Use

Page last updated: 2025-07-11
